desc: 本文件用于配置小程序接口权限相关，并设置了隐私合规相关开关。

deviceStorage.purpose: Age preference (localStorage only) — stores the user's selected age range (3-4/4-5/5-6) to adapt content presentation. Never uploaded to any server.
deviceStorage.purposeZh: 年龄偏好（仅本地存储）—— 存储用户选择的年龄段（3-4/4-5/5-6），用于适配内容展示。不上传至任何服务器。

deviceStorage.purpose: Language preference (localStorage only) — stores the user's preferred UI language. Never uploaded to any server.
deviceStorage.purposeZh: 语言偏好（仅本地存储）—— 存储用户偏好的界面语言。不上传至任何服务器。

deviceStorage.purpose: Browsing history (localStorage only) — anonymous question IDs viewed, stored locally for 'continue exploring' feature. Never uploaded to any server.
deviceStorage.purposeZh: 浏览历史（仅本地存储）—— 匿名浏览过的问题 ID，本地存储用于
功能。不上传至任何服务器。

deviceStorage.purpose: Saved questions (localStorage only) — anonymous question IDs saved by user. Never uploaded to any server.
deviceStorage.purposeZh: 收藏（仅本地存储）—— 匿名收藏的问题 ID。不上传至任何服务器。
